mapper.sql: agent_id, agent_name, workspace_dir, tmux_session, status, task_desc, model, context_pct, started_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t_ai_agent WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY status
SELECT FROM t_ai_agent WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ai_agent ( agent_id, agent_name, workspace_dir, tmux_session, status, task_desc, model, context_pct, started_at ) VALUES ( #{agentId}, #{agentName}, #{workspaceDir}, #{tmuxSession}, #{status}, #{taskDesc}, #{model}, #{contextPct}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_agent SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
